title: Swords of Enlightnment
description: Enjoy 6 new powerful but somewhat dangerous weapons made for PvP + 2 new structures!
body:
Swords of Enlightenment is a weapon mod that adds 6 new powerful weapons.

Weapons List:

Sword of Strength, when held gain Strength 3, Speed 2 and Jump Boost 2!

Sword of Agility, when right clicked launches you 5 blocks forward!

Sword of Immunity, when right clicked gain regeneration 3 for 5 seconds!

Sword of Stealth, when held gain Speed 2 and Invisibility!

Sword of Godly Power, combines all the swords in one!

And last, but not least, The Scepter of Foundations! When right clicked explode all the entities in the area!

 

Structures List:

Runic Ruins -  5 lost pillars that are worth your while!

Lost Civilization Buried Hideout - dangerous, but with good loot!

 

Enjoy!



Video:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zam9253MQ7I&t=1s
